title: Tech Process and Product Review
summary: Michael Donovan shared insights on AI applications, demonstrated Google Sites for hosting AI-generated content, and presented his marketing automation platform. Claude and Audrey Hayn discussed their focus on small to medium enterprises (HVAC), emphasizing solution-selling and integrating their website with Michael's platform and Fonoster. The group explored ways to collaborate, with Michael offering a beta access to his platform in exchange for data and feedback.

decisions.description: Claude Hayn plans to integrate their current website into a new communication suite, migrating off WordPress.
Claude Hayn will integrate Michael Donovan's marketing platform capabilities into their communication suite.
Claude Hayn plans to integrate Fonoster into their communication suite.
Audrey and Claude Hayn will explore Michael Donovan's marketing automation platform as a closed beta resource.

expectedOutcome.description: Functional and accessible marketing automation platform.

actionItems.task: Explore the marketing automation platform provided by Michael Donovan as a closed beta resource.

expectedOutcome.description: Familiarization with the features and potential uses of the platform.

actionItems.task: Explore the marketing automation platform provided by Michael Donovan as a closed beta resource.

expectedOutcome.description: Familiarization with the features and potential uses of the platform.

actionItems.task: Send a link to documentation on how the marketing automation platform environment is designed.

expectedOutcome.description: Accessible documentation detailing the design of the platform.

actionItems.task: Provide login credentials for the marketing automation platform.

expectedOutcome.description: Audrey and Claude Hayn gain access to the closed beta platform.

tensions: Audrey Hayn's company struggles to implement AI effectively due to a lack of understanding.
Concerns about VCON alone lacking high value without being paired with practical solutions.
referencesToPast: Michael Donovan's agency's experience with attribution models for car dealerships in 2015-2016.
Claude Hayn's past demos with Thomas where technology was over-emphasized.
